name: Peanut Butter Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Box Graham Crackers, coarsely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Using an electric beater, cream together the peanut butter and margarine until very soft and smooth.
2. Beat in the powdered sugar until smooth, then beat in half of the crushed graham crackers.
3. Beat until well blended and moist.
4. Mix in the remaining crushed graham crackers by hand.
5. Spread the mixture in a 13 x 9 inch baking pan, patting evenly.
6. Melt chocolate in the top of a double boiler over hot water or in the microwave, then pour over the cracker mixture.
7. Mark off desired size squares or bars and refrigerate, preferably overnight. If kept out of them that long, they will still be enjoyable.
This recipe makes about 5 dozen bars.
